Solana watchlist for tokens and positions

A watchlist should be more than saved tickers. SlimeWire connects watched tokens to alerts, charts, positions, PnL, proof, and Telegram or terminal handoff.

Open terminalToken scanner

What this workflow covers

Watched tokens

Keep selected tokens easy to revisit.

Alerts

Attach alerts and signal context to watched pairs.

Charts

Open watched tokens into chart and transaction review.

Positions

Connect watchlist context to wallet holdings and PnL.

Fresh pairs

Track promising new pairs without losing them in the feed.

Proof links

Let watched calls and outcomes remain shareable.

FAQ

What is a Solana watchlist?

A Solana watchlist is a saved set of tokens or pairs a user wants to revisit, monitor, or connect to alerts.

Should watchlists connect to positions?

Yes. Watchlists are more useful when they connect to wallet holdings, charts, alerts, and trade history.

Can a watchlist predict winners?

No. A watchlist organizes attention; it does not predict price movement.
